source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A flywheel of moment of inertia $I$ rotates about its center in a horizontal plane. A mass $m$ can slide freely along one of the spokes and is attached to the center of the wheel by a spring of natural length $l$ and force constant $k$ as shown in Fig. 2.64. Suppose the flywheel initially has a constant angular velocity $\Omega_{0}$ and the spring has a steady extension $r=r_{0}$. Use the result of part (a) to determine the relation between $\Omega_{0}$ and $r_{0}$ and the frequency of small oscillations about this initial configuration.
extraction_notes: image field contains a PIL image representation string rather than a file path or URL
force_requires_image inferred from the question text reference to Fig. 2.64

issues: metadata.image_paths contains a PIL image representation string rather than a file path or URL

image_dependency: 题干显式写有 'as shown in Fig. 2.64'，并给出 requires_image=true。
text_dominant=false，说明关键信息不是纯文本主导。
装置包含飞轮、辐条、滑块、弹簧的空间连接关系，通常需要借助示意图理解物理约束。
multi_step: 题目要求同时求稳态关系 Ω0 与 r0 的关系，以及该平衡点附近的小振动频率，至少包含两个目标。
题干明确要求 'Use the result of part (a)'，表明需要承接前一步结果再继续推导。
答案含两个解析表达式，涉及平衡条件与线性化/小振动分析，不像单步直接读图或代入。
verifiability: 答案是明确的闭式公式，包含 r0 和 ω 的具体表达，结果形式清晰。
answer_present=true 且答案长度适中，便于做符号一致性或结构化核验。
registry_passed=true，题干和答案资产登记完整，可支持后续规则检查。

risk_flags: metadata.image_paths contains a PIL image representation string rather than a file path or URL

decision_reasons: 题干、答案和主图像资产均存在，核心语义仍有较强可恢复性，不宜直接 reject。
样本被标记为 depends_on_part_a，说明解答依赖前一问结果，当前记录可能存在上下文缺口。
该题图像依赖很高，虽然已有可用图片文件，但元数据中的 image_paths 记录异常，后续整理成本和风险略高。
综合分数较高且可验证性较好，适合保留进入候选池，但优先级应低于完全自洽、无上下文依赖的样本。

A mass $m$ can slide freely along one of the spokes and is attached to the center of the wheel by a spring of natural length $l$ and force constant $k$ as shown in Fig. 2.64. metadata.reasoning_chain:
The Lagrangian of the system is
$$L=T-V= rac{1}{2}I\dot{	heta}^{2}+ rac{1}{2}m\dot{r}^{2}+ rac{1}{2}mr^{2}\dot{	heta}^{2}- rac{1}{2}k(r-l)^{2}.$$ 
Lagrange's equations
$$ rac{d}{dt}\left( rac{\partial L}{\partial \dot{q}_{i}}ight)- rac{\partial L}{\partial q_{i}}=0$$
give
$$m\ddot{r}-mr\dot{	heta}^{2}+k(r-l)=0,$$
$$ (I+mr^{2})\dot{	heta}=	ext{constant}=J, $$
or, combining the two,
$$m\ddot{r}- rac{mrJ^{2}}{(I+mr^{2})^{2}}+k(r-l)=0.$$ 
Initially, $\ddot{r}=0$, $r=r_{0}$, $\dot{	heta}=\Omega_{0}$, $J=(I+mr_{0}^{2})\Omega_{0}$. For small oscillations about this equilibrium configuration, let $r=r_{0}+ho$, where $ho\ll r_{0}$. As
$$ rac{mrJ^{2}}{(I+mr^{2})^{2}} \approx  rac{m(r_{0}+ho)J^{2}}{(I+mr_{0}^{2}+2mr_{0}ho)^{2}} \approx  rac{mr_{0}J^{2}}{(I+mr_{0}^{2})^{2}}\left(1+ rac{ho}{r_{0}}- rac{4mr_{0}ho}{I+mr_{0}^{2}}ight)$$
$$\approx  rac{mr_{0}J^{2}}{(I+mr_{0}^{2})^{2}}\left[1-\left( rac{3mr_{0}^{2}-I}{I+mr_{0}^{2}}ight) rac{ho}{r_{0}}ight] \approx  rac{mr_{0}J^{2}}{(I+mr_{0}^{2})^{2}}-\left( rac{3mr_{0}^{2}-I}{I+mr_{0}^{2}}ight)m\Omega_{0}^{2}ho,$$
and
$$ rac{mr_{0}J^{2}}{(I+mr_{0}^{2})^{2}}=mr_{0}\Omega_{0}^{2}=k(r_{0}-l).$$
Then the radial equation becomes
$$\ddot{ho}+\left[ rac{k}{m}+\left( rac{3mr_{0}^{2}-I}{I+mr_{0}^{2}}ight)\Omega_{0}^{2}ight]ho=0.$$
